emails.subject: Meter #: 6599
emails.body: Meter 6599 Deal 138049 is committed reserve long term gas totaling 1,350mm per day which is a good deal. However, deal 348446 is a duplicate deal which was overstated and should be zeroed out {bad deal}. This is Vance response to an inquiry made by Bob. Daren, do you want me to zero out deal 348446

emails.subject: Re: Meter #: 6599
emails.body: Re: Meter 6599 The term contract with Four Square attached to deal #138049 has been terminated. Therefore, we need to take that deal to zero for August 2000 forward. Additionally, we entered into a base load (August only) deal to purchase the gas from Four Star at mtr 6599 (#348446). The 1,500/day should be schueduled on this deal. Let me know if you have any questions. D From: Robert E Lloyd 08/02/2000 09:18 AM
